settings.tagline: Chartered Accountants for tax, GST, audit and compliance

services.name: GST Registration
services.short_description: GST registration support for proprietors, firms, companies and online sellers.
services.description: Get end-to-end help with GST registration, document review, application filing and follow-up. Suitable for new businesses, ecommerce sellers, service providers and traders.

services.name: Income Tax Return Filing
services.short_description: ITR filing for salaried individuals, freelancers, professionals and business owners.
services.description: We prepare and file income tax returns with proper review of Form 16, AIS, TIS, deductions, capital gains and business income where applicable.
features: Capital gain and freelance income support

services.name: Company Registration
services.price_text: Starting from Rs. 6999 plus government fees
services.short_description: Private Limited, LLP and OPC registration with compliance-ready documentation.
services.description: Start your company with name approval, DSC, DIN, incorporation forms, PAN, TAN and starter compliance guidance.

services.name: Tax Audit
services.short_description: Tax audit support for businesses and professionals under applicable income-tax rules.
services.description: Audit planning, books review, reporting and filing support for eligible businesses and professionals with a practical compliance checklist.

services.name: Accounting and Bookkeeping
services.short_description: Monthly accounting, bookkeeping, MIS and compliance records for growing businesses.
services.description: Maintain clean books with monthly entries, bank reconciliation, GST data preparation, receivables tracking and business reports.

services.name: GST Return Filing
services.short_description: GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, QRMP and annual return filing with reconciliation support.
services.description: GST return preparation and filing with sales, purchase, input tax credit and portal reconciliation support.

pricing_packages.name: Startup Compliance
pricing_packages.description: For new companies and LLPs that need regular tax and compliance support.

pricing_packages.name: Individual Tax
pricing_packages.description: For salaried employees, freelancers and investors filing annual ITR.

pricing_packages.name: Business Audit
pricing_packages.description: For businesses needing audit, review and year-end filing support.

faqs.question: Can I edit services and prices myself?
faqs.answer: Yes. Login to the admin panel, open Services, change the name, price, description or features, and save.

faqs.question: Will this website work on shared hosting?
faqs.answer: Yes. It is built with PHP and JSON files, so it works on most cPanel/shared hosting plans that support PHP.

faqs.question: Can clients call or message directly?
faqs.answer: Yes. Phone and WhatsApp buttons use the numbers saved in Settings.

faqs.question: Is SEO included?
faqs.answer: The website includes editable meta content, clean page structure, sitemap output and JSON-LD structured data. Ranking still depends on content quality, authority, speed and competition.

posts.title: Documents Needed for GST Registration
posts.excerpt: A practical checklist of documents normally required before applying for GST registration.
posts.content: Before applying for GST registration, keep PAN, Aadhaar, business address proof, bank details, photograph, authorization letter and business constitution documents ready. Requirements can vary by entity type, so verify the document list before filing.

posts.title: Simple ITR Filing Checklist
posts.excerpt: Keep Form 16, AIS, bank interest, deductions and investment details ready before filing ITR.
posts.content: A clean ITR filing process starts with Form 16, AIS/TIS review, bank interest details, capital gain statements, rent receipts, donation receipts and deduction proofs. Review everything before submission to reduce notice risk.

testimonials.name: Amit Verma
testimonials.quote: The team handled our GST registration and monthly filing with clear communication.

testimonials.name: Priya Mehta
